results.paper_title: QIRF: Quantum-Inspired Non-Orthogonal Function-Space Compression for 3D Gaussian Splatting

results.paper_title: SPARE-GS: Structural Parsimony and Resource Efficiency for 3D Gaussian Splatting

results.paper_title: Packet-Loss Robust 3D Gaussian Compression via Atomic Packaging and GNN-based Error Concealment
